target.label: Story 2.2 — Implement scripts/build-licenses.mjs generator + Sage Round-1 architectural addendum

rationale: P0 coverage 100% (6/6) ✅ — AC-02.2.1 (Node-stable + zero-dep + .mjs + 298 LOC), AC-02.2.2 (licenses:build deterministic, two-run byte-identical), AC-02.2.3 (licenses:check --check flag wired; NOT in scripts.test per spec — Story 2.3/A4 owns wire-in), AC-02.2.4 (byte-for-byte regression: git diff db6592b..74a795f -- LICENSES.md = exactly 4 cells = 3 SPDX deltas + 1 latolatinfonts.css block move), AC-02.2.5 (main/LICENSE.yml passthrough — option (a); first-party block rows 1-6 match spec ordering verbatim; Boost legal-compliance anchor preserved), AC-02.2.11 (NFR-01 wall-clock band confirmed at TWO independent CI runs: 24961417841 PR head f40843f = 17000 ms ∈ [13397, 20096] ms; 24961493231 push-to-main 74a795f = 17000 ms ∈ band; Δ vs rolling_mean_ms 16746.6 = +253.4 ms). P1 coverage 100% (4/4) ✅ — AC-02.2.6 (SPDX normalisation 3 cell deltas verified), AC-02.2.7 (first_party flag added to latolatinfonts.css; row position confirmed), AC-02.2.12 (§16 16/16 PASS — Sage independent re-grep + Murat re-verified), AC-02.2.13 (file-set scope = 11 named files only; zero diff to vendored utilities/fixtures/installer-config). P2 coverage 100% (3/3) ✅ — AC-02.2.8 (ADR-008 §5 step 1 'Schema reference' subsection added, headers reduced; option α; round-1 finding on main/LICENSE.yml > 3-line header closed via fixup commit 16c81b8), AC-02.2.9 (β-with-deferred-impl decision documented in story file; manifest fixup commit f40843f mechanical regen disclosed in File List + Change Log), AC-02.2.10 (sprint-status flip ready-for-dev→done + last_updated refreshed). Sage Round-1 (DEE-93) APPROVED with severity.max = P2; 4×P2 + 6×P3 across 4 dispatched perspectives (Aegis findings:[]; Vitra 3×P2 + 2×P3; Hermes 1×P3; Lydia 1×P2 + 3×P3); Iris correctly conditional-skipped (touchesUI=false). All 10 follow-ups bundled into DEE-98 (Bundle 1: Vitra ADR alignment; Bundle 2: Lydia parser test harness — Story 2.3/A4 scope-add; Bundle 3: Hermes wall-clock CI guard for licenses:check itself — Story 2.3/A4 AC). All Story 2.1 deferred follow-ups (P2-01 + P3-01 + P3-02 + P3-03) closed in this PR — verified by Sage pre-flight + Murat re-verification.

carry_forward.owner: Story 2.3 author / Winston (Architect) via DEE-98 Bundle 1
carry_forward.action: Vitra Bundle 1 — ADR-008 alignment refinements (3×P2 + 2×P3 spec/impl alignment improvements at the ADR-008 layer; e.g. naming conventions for passthrough mechanism, schema-flag default discussion, ADR §271 cross-reference). Folded into Story 2.3 / A4 review surface.

Lydia Bundle 2 — parser test harness scope-add: automated test coverage for parser fail-fast branches and --check drift-detection path. Natural surface of Story 2.3 / A4 since A4 wires licenses:check into scripts.test. P2-04 'parser harness scope-add' tracked in DEE-98 Bundle 2.

carry_forward.owner: Story 2.3 author / Hermes via DEE-98 Bundle 3
carry_forward.action: Hermes P3-06 — wall-clock CI guard for licenses:check itself (750 ms threshold), separate from npm test wall-clock band. Becomes a Story 2.3 / A4 AC.

Fold 4× COMMENTED inline GitHub Copilot findings (notes-type validation, absolute-path rejection in deriveUnit, drift-diff unified-format honesty, failIO() prefix) — all already routed into DEE-98 bundles, no re-review needed.
